title: Smoky Crispy Pepperoni Stir-fry
description: A meal-prep Chinese dish featuring smoky flavors from pepperoni and raw-friendly ingredients like dry sherry, all stir-fried to perfection.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine pepperoni, garlic, sherry, chili flakes, and olive oil. Mix well until all pieces of pepperoni are evenly coated.
Place the mixed pepperoni mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 10 minutes or until the pepperoni becomes crispy and golden brown.
Meanwhile, in a wok or large skillet, heat 2 tbsp of olive oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced red peppers and green onions to sauté for about 5 minutes or until they start to soften.
Add pre-cooked crispy pepperoni to the wok with vegetables and stir well. Cook for another 3-4 minutes until all ingredients are heated through.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice.
